channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 China Yuan Settlements Hit Record High Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: China Cross-border Interbank Payment System (CIPS) reached a record single-day transaction value of 1.22 trillion yuan, with analysts saying the Middle East conflict has acted as a catalyst for rising demand in yuan settlement, particularly in oil trade.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ US Navy Secretary John Phelan Removed From Position
item.description: The Pentagon announced Navy Secretary John Phelan is departing "effective immediately" with no reason given. Former Virginia Senate candidate and special operations veteran Hung Cao will serve as acting secretary.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇪🇺 Germany Shifts Military Strategy Away From US Dependence
item.description: Germany new military doctrine emphasizes "less America, more Europe" as Berlin prepares for reduced US contributions to European security and takes greater responsibility for its own defense capabilities.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇯🇴 Two Israeli Soldiers Killed in Jordan Border Crossing Attack
item.description: Two Israeli soldiers were shot dead by a Jordanian aid truck driver near the Allenby (King Hussein) Crossing between the West Bank and Jordan. The attacker was neutralized at the site.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan Energy Strategy Faces Competition From China in Central Asia
item.description: Japan efforts to secure energy resources in Central Asia and Latin America are encountering significant competition from China, which has already established a strong presence in these regions through infrastructure investments and trade agreements.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦 At least 16 killed in Ukraine-Russia strikes on Chernobyl anniversary
item.description: Strikes across Ukraine, Russian-occupied Crimea, and inside Russia killed at least 16 people as the 40th anniversary of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster prompted fresh warnings about risks from attacks near nuclear facilities. Ukrainian forces struck an oil refinery deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇵🇰 Iran foreign minister returns to Pakistan as US talks scrapped
item.description: Iran's top diplomat arrived back in Pakistan after planned talks with the US delegation were canceled. Trump says both sides can continue negotiations by phone as diplomatic efforts to end the Iran conflict continue.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Netanyahu orders army to attack Hezbollah in Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli PM directed the military to "vigorously attack" Hezbollah in Lebanon after six people were killed by strikes despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Seven killed in major Russian attack on Ukraine
item.description: A major Russian strike on the city of Dnipro killed at least seven people, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

item.title: 🇲🇽🇺🇸 Mexico says US agents killed in crash were not authorized
item.description: Mexico's government stated that two US federal agents who died in a car crash were not permitted to participate in local operations. The agents reportedly worked for the CIA.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ White House correspondents dinner gunman identified
item.description: The suspect arrested at the Washington Hilton event has been identified as Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old from California. Trump and officials were evacuated after shots were fired outside the venue.

item.title: 🇺🇦 8 killed, 21 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine over past day
item.description: Russian forces continue to pound Ukrainian cities with drone and missile strikes as the front-line war grinds on.

item.title: 🇦🇿 Zelensky signs cooperation deals with Azerbaijan during first wartime visit
item.description: Ukrainian president continues diplomatic push in the Caucasus region following similar deals with Gulf states.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany attributes global Signal and WhatsApp cyber campaign to Russia
item.description: Berlin says the coordinated disinformation attack on encrypted messaging platforms likely originated in Moscow.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Southern Command creates new autonomous warfare unit
item.description: New command to integrate autonomous, semi-autonomous and unmanned platforms across Latin American operations.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu accuses Hezbollah of sabotaging Lebanon peace talks
item.description: Israeli PM says the Iran-backed group is actively undermining diplomatic efforts to reach a ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Mali Defence Minister killed in al-Qaeda-linked attack near Bamako
item.description: Mali Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in an attack by al Qaeda-linked group JNIM on his residence at the Kati military base outside Bamako, as coordinated assaults across Mali plunge the country into unprecedented security crisis.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Malian troops and Russian mercenaries withdraw from Kidal after rebel offensive
item.description: Malian troops and Russian Africa Corps mercenaries have withdrawn from the northern city of Kidal following coordinated attacks by Tuareg separatists and al-Qaeda-linked JNIM militants, marking a significant shift in the Sahel conflict.

item.title: 🌏 Australia foreign minister to visit Japan, China, South Korea for energy security talks
item.description: Australian Foreign Minister Penny Wong announced visits to Japan, China and South Korea this week for discussions on energy security amid disruptions caused by the Middle East conflict and Strait of Hormuz tensions.

item.title: 🇪🇬 Egypt economic growth forecasts cut due to Iran war impact
item.description: Analysts have reduced forecasts for Egyptian economic growth in a Reuters poll as the Iran conflict drives up energy prices and pressures inflation, with regional economic impacts expected to last months.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu's Top Rivals Form Alliance to Challenge His Coalition
item.description: Two of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's most formidable political rivals announced they are joining forces to contest the upcoming election and oust his coalition government.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦🇷🇺 Trump Confirms Separate Calls with Putin and Zelensky on Ukraine
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said he has had "good conversations" with both Russian President Vladimir Putin and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky as de-escalation efforts continue.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Iran and US Stuck in Awkward "No War, No Peace" Limbo
item.description: As diplomatic efforts stall with Trump canceling envoy visits to Pakistan, both Washington and Tehran are betting they can outlast the other in a precarious stalemate without a formal deal.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇮🇷 Iran's Foreign Minister Returns to Pakistan for Key US-Iran Talks
item.description: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived back in Islamabad for high-level meetings as Pakistan seeks to revive peace negotiations between the US and Iran after Trump canceled the dispatch of American envoys.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia bus bombing kills 13 amid escalating drug-trafficking violence
item.description: An explosive device detonated on a bus in Cauca province, killing 13 and injuring 38 including five children. Army chief called it a terrorist act blamed on FARC dissidents, amid a wave of 26 similar incidents in the last two days.
